description: Push Claude Code session transcripts (SessionEnd) and compact summaries (PostCompact) to PowerMem via HTTP. UserPromptSubmit: semantic search injects context by default; set POWERMEM_PROMPT_SEARCH=0 (or false/no/off) to disable. Uses native binaries under hooks/bin. macOS/Linux: sh launcher. Windows without sh: merge hooks/hooks.windows.example.json. POWERMEM_BASE_URL defaults to http://localhost:8848 if unset.
